queries.question: List arrival airport name from flight_routes where airline name is not one of Ryanair, American Airlines.
queries.sql: SELECT "arrival_airport_name" FROM "flight_routes" WHERE "airline_name" NOT IN ('Ryanair', 'American Airlines');

List airport name from airports records linked to airlines where airlines airline name equals Air St. Thomas.
queries.sql: SELECT "airports"."airport_name" FROM "airlines" JOIN "airports" ON "airlines"."country" = "airports"."country" WHERE "airlines"."airline_name" = 'Air St. Thomas';

queries.question: List airline name from airlines records optionally linked to airports where airlines active is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "airlines"."airline_name" FROM "airlines" LEFT JOIN "airports" ON "airlines"."country" = "airports"."country" WHERE "airlines"."active" IS NOT NULL;

queries.question: List airport name from airports records optionally linked to airlines where airports city is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "airports"."airport_name" FROM "airports" LEFT JOIN "airlines" ON "airports"."country" = "airlines"."country" WHERE "airports"."city" IS NOT NULL;

queries.sql: SELECT "flight_routes"."arrival_airport_name" FROM "flight_routes" FULL OUTER JOIN "airlines" ON "flight_routes"."airline_name" = "airlines"."airline_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "airports" ON "flight_routes"."arrival_airport_name" = "airports"."airport_name" WHERE ("flight_routes"."row_id" IN (377, 243, 1267, 1360, 847, 1041, 1310, 2321, 1541, 1193, 1739, 2416, 1442, 2228, 2031, 1051, 2278, 713, 1105, 2464, 1666, 2016, 584, 2254, 1881, 143, 2011, 830, 2248, 416, 11, 1548, 1775, 1222, 1241, 342)) OR ("airlines"."row_id" IN (73, 76, 192, 127)) OR ("airports"."row_id" IN (725, 2261, 6380, 165, 232));
